overrides.text: persistence MUST be the in-memory store, not a database
overrides.justification: The @prisma/client dependency exists in package.json as part of the repository template, but the notes-store implementation uses only in-memory Map storage and does not import or use @prisma/client anywhere. The implementation satisfies the constraint by using pure in-memory storage without any database persistence.

overrides.text: Authentication / users / authorization are out of scope
overrides.justification: The next-auth dependency exists in package.json as part of the repository template, but the notes-store implementation does not import or use next-auth, auth0, or firebase anywhere. The implementation satisfies the constraint by being completely independent of authentication systems.
